address.description: The full raw address string to parse and verify. Example: '123 N Main St Apt 4, Springfield, IL 62701'. Should be a single-line or multi-line US-style address. Do not guess if empty or missing — return an error.
address.title: Address

streetNumber.description: The house or building number. Example: '123'. Empty string if not found.
streetNumber.title: Streetnumber

preDirectional.description: The directional prefix before the street name. Values: N, S, E, W, NE, NW, SE, SW. Empty string if not present.
preDirectional.title: Predirectional

streetName.description: The primary street name without number, direction, or type. Example: 'Main'. Empty string if not found.
streetName.title: Streetname

streetType.description: The street suffix/type. Examples: St, Ave, Blvd, Dr, Ln, Rd, Ct, Pl, Way, Cir. Abbreviated form preferred. Empty string if not found.
streetType.title: Streettype

postDirectional.description: The directional suffix after the street name/type. Values: N, S, E, W, NE, NW, SE, SW. Empty string if not present.
postDirectional.title: Postdirectional

unitType.description: The secondary address unit designator. Examples: Apt, Suite, Unit, Bldg, Floor, Rm. Empty string if not present.
unitType.title: Unittype

unitNumber.description: The secondary address unit number or letter. Example: '4', 'B'. Empty string if not present.
unitNumber.title: Unitnumber

city.description: The city or municipality name. Example: 'Springfield'. Empty string if not found.
city.title: City

state.description: The US state or territory as a 2-letter abbreviation (e.g., 'IL', 'CA'). Empty string if not found.
state.title: State

zipCode.description: The 5-digit ZIP code. Example: '62701'. Empty string if not found.
zipCode.title: Zipcode

zipPlus4.description: The 4-digit ZIP+4 extension, without the dash. Example: '1234'. Empty string if not present.
zipPlus4.title: Zipplus4

country.description: The country code. Defaults to 'US' if not specified in the input.
country.title: Country

formattedAddress.description: The full address reassembled in standard USPS format. Example: '123 N Main St Apt 4, Springfield, IL 62701'.
formattedAddress.title: Formattedaddress

confidence.description: Confidence level of the parse. 'high' = all key parts found clearly. 'medium' = some parts inferred or ambiguous. 'low' = significant parts missing or unclear.
confidence.title: Confidence

notes.description: Any warnings, ambiguities, or issues encountered during parsing. Empty string if none.
notes.title: Notes

usps_validated.description: Whether the address was successfully validated against the USPS API.
usps_validated.title: Usps Validated

usps_match_code.description: The USPS address match code from the Addresses v3 API. Empty string if not validated.
usps_match_code.title: Usps Match Code
